headline: Roivant Sciences Ltd. (ROIV): One of the Best Stocks to Buy According to Joe Edelman
summary: We just covered the Billionaire Joe Edelman’s 10 Stock Picks with Huge Upside Potential and Roivant Sciences Ltd. (NASDAQ:ROIV) ranks 8th on this list. Roivant Sciences Ltd. (NASDAQ:ROIV) recently won a major legal battle. In March, Roivant’s subsidiaries, Genevant and Arbutus, reached a $2.25 billion global settlement with Moderna over a COVID-19 vaccine patent.
